3141480.name: Immortals Revenge
3141480.description:
[Get Equipment, Skin and Diamonds]
• Join the battle to get Equipment: Defeat Bosses to drop Superb Equipment. All equipment can be traded in the Auction House, and equipment can be obtained by defeating Bosses Equipment can be exchanged with other players.
• Get Wings and Artifacts at the Boss: Defeat Bosses to randomly obtain various Wings and Artifacts. Equip Wings and Artifacts to get cool skins and increase BR and special attributes significantly.
• Get Lots of Diamonds: Kill monsters to get diamonds and use them in the systems. You can also be strong when you are in the AFK mode.

[Get Free Angels]
• Full-screen Archangel Expertise: Immersive 3D gaming experience. Gorgeous Angels descend from the sky and release powerful skills. Kill the monsters and get lots of EXP. A cool, hearty and exciting battle experience!

[Get Free VIP]
• Get for free! Complete the quest to upgrade your VIP level for free.
• Upgrade VIP level to claim: Exclusive Skin (Title, Avatar, Frame, Background, Artifact Skin, Exclusive Mount, Exclusive Wings), Superb Equipment, Promotion Material, Enhancement Material, EXP Orb and Lots of Diamonds.
• Upgrade VIP level to claim privilege: Boss DMG Bonus and higher ultimate drop rates.

[Countless Bonus]
• 14 Days Login Bonus
• Get Peerage Free
Purchase Peerage once to get massive privileges for life. First Purchase will activate Earl Privilege and get Amber back.
Exclusive privileges: Additional EXP Dungeon and Material Dungeon Purchases.
Peerage Daily Pack: Lots of Promotion and Enhancement Materials and BOSS Challenge Token.
Exclusive Pack: 90% Off Limited Pet, Limited Mount, Advanced Gem, Limited Card and so on.
